citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 1:50 pm on March
11, 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by phone at 1:53 pm. waited at facility and left a "Sorry We
Missed You" note and business card in the front door. USDA left facility at 2:30 pm. Failure to provide access to the
facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access
is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 1:50 pm on March 
11, 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by phone at 1:53 pm. waited at facility and left a "Sorry We 
Missed You" note and business card in the front door. USDA left facility at 2:30 pm. Failure to provide access to the 
facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access 
is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
